creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 174352
Proposed patch (since 412346 revision)

Patch to update games/oolite port from 1.82 to 1.84 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/OoliteProject/oolite/releases/tag/1.84
https://github.com/OoliteProject/oolite/blob/1.84/Doc/CHANGELOG.TXT
http://aegidian.org/bb/viewtopic.php?f=1&t=18243

- Add gl to USE_GL and x11 to USE_XORG, found by stage-qa
- Remove (sed) patch, which fixed by upstream

The build tested on FreeBSD 10.2 amd64.
